title: Thermo King Joins Road Ready's LogIQ Smart Partner Network
text: SAN DIEGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Road Ready, the leader in advanced telematics and smart fleet solutions from Clarience Technologies, today announced Thermo King is joining its LogIQ smart partner network, expanding the brand's connectivity solutions to now include cold chain technology.

title: Trane Technologies to Debut and Feature Employee-Powered Social Innovation and Decarbonization Solutions at VERGE22
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, will be at VERGE22 to debut a net-zero cooling cart designed to provide sustainable and affordable cooling for street vendors, while combating food loss, reducing emissions and improving their livelihoods.

title: Shortages Have Turned to Gluts. These Stocks Could Benefit.
text: When a company has too much to sell, it has little choice but to start discounting. But some, like off-price retailers TJX, Ross Stores, and Burlington Stores, could benefit from the trend.

title: Mark George, CFO for Norfolk Southern Corporation, and Melissa Schaeffer, CFO for Air Products and Chemicals, Inc., Join Trane Technologies Board of Directors
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed two new members, Mark George and Melissa Schaeffer.

title: Trane Technologies Schedules Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, will host a conference call to discuss its third quarter 2022 financial results on Wednesday, November 2, 2022, at 10 a.m. ET. The company will issue its third quarter earnings release and earnings presentation in advance of the call; both will be available on the Trane Technologies website. A real-time, listen-only webcast of the conference call will be broadcast live over the internet. Individuals wishing to listen can access the call through the company’s website at www.tranetechnologies.com under the investor relations section. For those unable to listen to the live event, a replay will be available on the company’s website at approximately 1 p.m. ET, November 2, 2022. About Trane Technologies Trane Technologies is a global climate innovator. Through our strategic brands Trane® and Thermo King®, and our portfolio of environmentally responsible products and services, we bring efficient and sustainable climate solutions to buildings, homes, and transportation. Learn more at tranetechologies.com.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain Trane Technologies (TT) Now
text: Focus on growth objectives and pro-investor steps boost Trane Technologies (TT).

title: Thermo King® by Trane Technologies Accelerates Cold Chain Decarbonization Following Electric Trailer Trials with Walmart, Loblaws and Martin Brower
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Thermo King®, a leader in transport temperature control solutions and a brand of Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), has completed initial testing of its innovative evolve™ electric trailer with retailers Walmart and Loblaws, and Martin Brower, a leading supply chain solutions provider for restaurants around the world.
